headline: General Dynamics Corp (NYSE:GD) Balances Strong Dividend Rating with Solid Profitability and Financial Health
summary: General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) offers a strong, sustainable 1.82% dividend backed by solid profitability and financial health, making it a top pick for reliable income investors.
